name: UNION PACIFIC CORP
summary: Union Pacific Corporation, through its principal subsidiary Union Pacific Railroad Company (UPRR), operates a Class I railroad across 32,889 route miles connecting 23 states in the western two-thirds of the U.S. The company transports Bulk commodities (grain, coal, fertilizer), Industrial products (chemicals, plastics, metals, petroleum), and Premium freight (intermodal, automotive) through Gulf Coast, Pacific Coast ports, and Mexican and Canadian gateways, generating $23.2 billion in freight revenues in 2025.

products.name: Bulk Freight Services
products.description: Rail transportation of grain, grain products, fertilizer, food, refrigerated goods, coal, and renewables; 33% of 2025 freight revenues.

products.name: Industrial Freight Services
products.description: Rail transportation of chemicals, plastics, metals, petroleum, construction materials, forest products, and sand; 37% of 2025 freight revenues.

products.name: Premium Freight Services
products.description: Intermodal and automotive rail transportation services connecting major ports and domestic markets; 30% of 2025 freight revenues.

partnerships.description: Proposed merger to create America's first transcontinental railroad; pending regulatory approval as of filing date.
Coordinated schedules and interchange connections to move freight to and from Canadian gateways.
